mapper.select: SELECT #{projectId} AS projectId, AVG(fc.uqs_score) AS avgUQS, SUM(CASE WHEN fc.first_pass = true THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) * 100.0 / NULLIF(COUNT(fc.id),0) AS firstPassRate, SUM(fc.complexity_score) AS totalWriteComplexity, SUM(fc.exec_complexity_score) AS totalExecComplexity, AVG(fc.complexity_score) AS avgComplexity, VAR_POP(fc.complexity_score) AS complexityVariance, AVG(fc.write_time_deviation) AS avgWriteTimeDeviation, AVG(fc.exec_time_deviation) AS avgExecTimeDeviation, SUM(CASE WHEN fc.complexity_level = 'LOW' THEN fc.expected_write_time ELSE 0 END) AS expectedWriteTimeLow, SUM(CASE WHEN fc.complexity_level = 'MEDIUM' THEN fc.expected_write_time ELSE 0 END) AS expectedWriteTimeMedium, SUM(CASE WHEN fc.complexity_level = 'HIGH' THEN fc.expected_write_time ELSE 0 END) AS expectedWriteTimeHigh, SUM(CASE WHEN fc.complexity_level = 'LOW' THEN fc.actual_write_time ELSE 0 END) AS actualWriteTimeLow, SUM(CASE WHEN fc.complexity_level = 'MEDIUM' THEN fc.actual_write_time ELSE 0 END) AS actualWriteTimeMedium, SUM(CASE WHEN fc.complexity_level = 'HIGH' THEN fc.actual_write_time ELSE 0 END) AS actualWriteTimeHigh, SUM(CASE WHEN fc.complexity_level = 'LOW' THEN fc.write_time_deviation ELSE 0 END) AS writeTimeDeviationLow, SUM(CASE WHEN fc.complexity_level = 'MEDIUM' THEN fc.write_time_deviation ELSE 0 END) AS writeTimeDeviationMedium, SUM(CASE WHEN fc.complexity_level = 'HIGH' THEN fc.write_time_deviation ELSE 0 END) AS writeTimeDeviationHigh, SUM(CASE WHEN fc.complexity_level = 'LOW' THEN fc.exec_time_deviation ELSE 0 END) AS execTimeDeviationLow, SUM(CASE WHEN fc.complexity_level = 'MEDIUM' THEN fc.exec_time_deviation ELSE 0 END) AS execTimeDeviationMedium, SUM(CASE WHEN fc.complexity_level = 'HIGH' THEN fc.exec_time_deviation ELSE 0 END) AS execTimeDeviationHigh, SUM(CASE WHEN fc.is_reused = true THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) * 100.0 / NULLIF(COUNT(fc.id),0) AS reuseRateByCount, SUM(CASE WHEN fc.is_reused = true THEN fc.complexity_score ELSE 0 END) * 100.0 / NULLIF(SUM(fc.complexity_score),0) AS reuseRateByWorkload, SUM(fc.reuse_time_savings) AS absoluteTimeSavings, SUM(fc.new_cases) * 100.0 / NULLIF(COUNT(fc.id),0) AS caseGrowthRate, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM spotter_efficiency.case_change_log WHERE project_id = #{projectId}) AS caseChangeHeat, AVG(fc.exec_duration) AS avgCaseExecDuration, SUM(CASE WHEN fc.is_manual = true THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) * 100.0 / NULLIF(COUNT(fc.id),0) AS manualCaseExecHeat, COUNT(fc.id) AS totalCaseCount, (SELECT GROUP_CONCAT(json_str SEPARATOR ',') FROM ( SELECT JSON_OBJECT('caseId', fc2.id, 'caseName', fc2.name, 'execCount', fc2.exec_count, 'complexity', fc2.complexity_score) as json_str FROM functional_case fc2 WHERE fc2.project_id = #{projectId} ORDER BY fc2.exec_count DESC LIMIT 5 ) t) AS topFrequentCasesRaw FROM functional_case fc WHERE fc.project_id = #{projectId} GROUP BY fc.project_id
